ddls:
CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of bank */,
  "head_office_location" TEXT /* Location of the bank's head office */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the bank was established */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the bank */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the bank */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiaries" (
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beneficiary record */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bank */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the beneficiaries are located */,
  "beneficiary_type" TEXT /* Type of beneficiary */,
  "rural_beneficiaries" INTEGER /* Number of beneficiaries at rural/semiurban bank branches */,
  "urban_beneficiaries" INTEGER /* Number of beneficiaries at urban metro bank branches */,
  "total_beneficiaries" INTEGER /* Total number of beneficiaries */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the beneficiary was registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beneficiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiaries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiaries_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_info" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beneficiary record */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account */,
  "deposits" REAL /* Deposits in accounts (in lakhs) */,
  "rupay_debit_cards" INTEGER /* Number of Rupay Debit Cards issued to beneficiaries */,
  "date_opened" TEXT /* Date when the account was opened */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_info_beneficiary_id FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_id") REFERENCES beneficiaries ("beneficiary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., rural, urban metro) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the region */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
column_names: Location of the bank's head office
Contact phone number for the bank
Unique identifier for each beneficiary record
Reference to the region where the beneficiaries are located
Number of beneficiaries at rural/semiurban bank branches
Number of beneficiaries at urban metro bank branches
Date when the beneficiary was registered
Number of Rupay Debit Cards issued to beneficiaries
Date when the account was opened
Type of region (e.g., rural, urban metro)
Area of the region in square kilometers
GDP per capita of the region
